entries.name: Horizontal Parallax Gallery
entries.sectionRole: Gallery / portfolio band. Often deployed mid-page as the showcase moment of a folio or editorial feature
entries.techStack: Vanilla JS + CSS (no WebGL, no GSAP). Vertical scroll input is mapped to horizontal translation of a row of image panels, with per-layer parallax

entries.name: Canvas Grid Mouse
entries.sectionRole: Hero / above-the-fold ambient. Replaces a static hero background with a cursor-reactive canvas field
entries.techStack: Vanilla JS + Canvas 2D. No GSAP, no Tweakpane. The canvas is sized to the smaller viewport dimension and re-renders on every cursor move + every animation frame

entries.name: Delphi clone
entries.sectionRole: Hero. A signature-tier launch / campaign hero, not a recurring band
entries.techStack: Three.js / WebGL. The slug `delphi-three` implies the Three.js variant of a Delphi project; presumably a 3D scene with cloned/duplicated subject(s) rendered through WebGL

entries.name: Telescope Zoom
entries.sectionRole: Hero transition / scroll-driven reveal. The first scroll on the page is the move
entries.techStack: Original uses GSAP; reimplementable in vanilla JS via `IntersectionObserver` + scroll progress mapping. Medium reimpl cost

entries.name: Shader Animation (GSAP)
entries.sectionRole: Hero or transition between image states. Image-to-image dissolves with shader-driven distortion
entries.techStack: Three.js + custom GLSL fragment shader + GSAP. The shader uniforms (progress, distortion, color shift) are animated by GSAP timelines on click. High reimpl cost — requires GLSL knowledge

entries.name: Gridmorphic
entries.sectionRole: Gallery / content surface. The name suggests a grid that morphs between layouts
entries.techStack: TBD — source page inaccessible to programmatic fetch. Likely vanilla JS + CSS Grid + transform-based morphing; may use GSAP

entries.name: Imagen Header
entries.sectionRole: Hero only. A statement opener for AI / generative / launch pages
entries.techStack: React Three Fiber + Three.js Shading Language (TSL) + GSAP + Tailwind. Original is React-based. High reimpl cost; non-React reimpl would require porting TSL shader to GLSL

entries.name: Elastic Grid Scroll
entries.sectionRole: Gallery / content surface. A mid-page or full-page gallery moment that turns scrolling into the showcase mechanic
entries.techStack: Vanilla JS + CSS (no GSAP). Scroll velocity drives per-item transforms (skew + scale + translate) with elastic falloff that releases when scroll stops

entries.name: Elastic Cards (4×2 variant)
entries.sectionRole: Feature grid / showcase. A smaller, more curated cousin of S8 — designed for 8 marquee items rather than a wide gallery
entries.techStack: Vanilla JS + CSS (no GSAP). Inherits the elastic-scroll behavior of S8, plus per-card hover micro-motion in the Sadie idiom (smooth scale + caption reveal)
